item.title: Family perspective adds new context to disappearance
item.description: A family’s account adds new context to the disappearance of two babies, shifting how the case is viewed.

item.title: The sister who reported it found her first
item.description: A missing-person case takes a tragic turn as the timeline of events reveals how the sister who reported it was the first to find her.

item.title: The Disturbing Case of Trish Haynes
item.description: A look at the case of Trish Haynes, whose story drew attention after she was found in a washing machine.
